cards.name: Knight of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: practical, reliable, efficient, stoic, slow and steady, hard-working, committed, patient, conservative

cards.name: 2 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: balancing resources, adaptation, resourcefulness, flexibility, stretching resources

cards.name: Queen of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: insecurity, giving too much, overly-sensitive, needy, fragile, dependence, martyrdom
